case_title: SUSAN RIVERA VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SUSAN RIVERA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS EUGENE PEREZ. DEFENDANT NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY EVELYN CATALAN, SR. PROPERTY OPS, AND AMANDA ABRAMSON, RELOCATION SUPERVISOR. SERVICE IS FOUND TO BE PROPER AND SERVICE ISSUES WAIVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, SUSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00, HEALTH ISSUES (ALLERGIES) AND MEDICATION NEEDED, PAIN & SUFFERING FROM THE RELATED CONSTRUCTION NUISANCE NEXT TO PLAINTIFF'S UNIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED MAR-11-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAR-16-2022 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
